items.example: I used to play football when I was a kid.
I would always collect insects as a child.
I didn't use to like classical music, but now I love it.
When I was younger, I spent a lot of time with my grandparents.
As a child, I would practise my Oscar speech in the mirror.
My childhood dream was to be an actress.
Things have changed — now I work as a software developer.
I remember I used to dream of being an artist.
